title: Ayenia oligantha

intro: Ayenia oligantha is a species of flowering plant in the family Malpighiaceae, commonly known as the "cachote" in traditional medicine. The health benefits of Ayenia oligantha include its use as a treatment for various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The bioactive constituents of Ayenia oligantha include flavonoids, alkaloids, and terpenes, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. Traditionally, Ayenia oligantha is used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being incorporated into topical creams and ointments for its skin-soothing effects.
